VBoxContainer.Button: if you press me i'm gone :c

Scene.GDScript:
extends Node
func hover(node): node.text = "Hehehe~ -w-"
func unhover(node): node.text = "hover me! :D"
func press(node): node.mouse_filter = 2 var original = node.text node.text = "Owh!~ Pls dont poke me! >////<" var timer = Timer.new() timer.wait_time = 1 node.add_child(timer) timer.start() await timer.timeout timer.queue_free() node.text = original node.mouse_filter = 0
